msg_xml=<devil:Message xmlns:devil="urn:com:brandes:syndeo:mil-std-2045-47001" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="urn:com:brandes:syndeo:mil-std-2045-47001 Mil-Std-2045-47001.xsd"><devil:MessageId>653f92e0-9a3e-4f28-b034-324a4056d8e4</devil:MessageId><devil:MessageType>USMTF</devil:MessageType><devil:MessageSubType/><devil:Compression>GZIP</devil:Compression><devil:Subject>1.1.4 UNCLAS ROUTINE ACP-128</devil:Subject><devil:From>ONI CAC WASHINGTON DC</devil:From><devil:DTG>081530Z JUN 20</devil:DTG><devil:PrecedenceTo>ROUTINE</devil:PrecedenceTo><devil:PrecedenceCopy>ROUTINE</devil:PrecedenceCopy><devil:Classification>UNCLASSIFIED</devil:Classification><devil:RecipientsTo><devil:Recipient Dual-Rcv="false">CIA WASHINGTON DC</devil:Recipient></devil:RecipientsTo><devil:RecipientsCopy><devil:Recipient Dual-Rcv="false">ONI CAC WASHINGTON DC</devil:Recipient></devil:RecipientsCopy><devil:Body>SUBJ: 1.1.4 UNCLAS ROUTINE ACP-128&#xD;
**** THIS MESSAGE CLASSIFIED FOR TESTING PURPOSES ONLY. ****&#xD;
The Arab Republic of Egypt is a sovereign country located in eastern&#xD;
 North Africa that includes the Sinai Peninsula, a land bridge to&#xD;
 Asia.  Covering an area of about 1,001,450 square kilometers&#xD;
 (386,660 sq mi), Egypt borders Libya to the west, Sudan to the south&#xD;
 and the Gaza Strip and Israel to the east. Its northern coast&#xD;
 borders the Mediterranean Sea; the eastern coast borders the Red&#xD;
 Sea.</devil:Body><devil:AttachmentList><devil:Attachment><devil:AttachmentName>TextAttachment.txt</devil:AttachmentName><devil:AttachmentDescription>TextAttachment.txt</devil:AttachmentDescription><devil:AttachmentSize>692.0</devil:AttachmentSize><devil:AttachmentData devil:composition="zip:base64"></devil:AttachmentData></devil:Attachment></devil:AttachmentList></devil:Message>
